title: The Underground Toronto Sound: Why 2026 Is Different
content: The city's hip-hop scene has shifted. From basement studios in Scarborough to sold-out shows at the Danforth Music Hall, Toronto's underground is louder and more authentic than ever. Here's what changed and who's leading it.

title: Late Night in the Lab — Building "No Sleep"
content: The making of the heaviest track yet. From 3 AM melodies to 808s that shake the walls. Every great track starts with a late night. This one was no different — pulling inspiration from the empty Toronto streets at 3 AM, the hum of the city that never quite sleeps.

title: Toronto After Midnight — A Dark Trap Diary
content: Night drives through the 6ix, empty streets, and the inspiration that only comes after midnight. There is something about this city when the lights dim and the crowds disappear.

title: From Basement to Stage — The First Show

title: Studio Gear Setup — The Dark Trap Signal Chain
